ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vertex_attributes" (
  "attribute_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vertex attribute */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the vertex attribute */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the vertex attribute */,
  "max_value" INTEGER /* Maximum number of active vertex attributes */,
  "version" TEXT /* OpenGL version where the attribute is supported */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the vertex attribute */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value of the vertex attribute */,
  "usage_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the attribute is used in different shader programs */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date and time when the attribute was last modified */,
  "documentation_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the documentation table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attribute_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vertex_attributes_documentation_id FOREIGN KEY ("documentation_id") REFERENCES documentation ("documentation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vertex_attributes_version FOREIGN KEY ("version") REFERENCES shader_versions ("version_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "uniform_components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each uniform component */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the uniform component */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the uniform component */,
  "max_value" INTEGER /* Maximum number of components for vertex shader uniform variables */,
  "version" TEXT /* OpenGL version where the component is supported */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the uniform component */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value of the uniform component */,
  "usage_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the component is used in different shader programs */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date and time when the component was last modified */,
  "documentation_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the documentation table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_uniform_components_version FOREIGN KEY ("version") REFERENCES shader_versions ("version_number"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_uniform_components_documentation_id FOREIGN KEY ("documentation_id") REFERENCES documentation ("documentation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "uniform_blocks" (
  "block_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each uniform block */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the uniform block */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the uniform block */,
  "max_value" INTEGER /* Maximum number of vertex uniform buffers per program */,
  "version" TEXT /* OpenGL version where the block is supported */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the uniform block */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value of the uniform block */,
  "usage_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the block is used in different shader programs */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date and time when the block was last modified */,
  "documentation_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the documentation table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("block_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_uniform_blocks_documentation_id FOREIGN KEY ("documentation_id") REFERENCES documentation ("documentation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_uniform_blocks_version FOREIGN KEY ("version") REFERENCES shader_versions ("version_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "output_components" (
  "output_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each output component */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the output component */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the output component */,
  "max_value" INTEGER /* Maximum number of components of outputs written by a vertex shader */,
  "version" TEXT /* OpenGL version where the output component is supported */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the output component */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value of the output component */,
  "usage_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the component is used in different shader programs */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date and time when the component was last modified */,
  "documentation_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the documentation table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("output_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_output_components_documentation_id FOREIGN KEY ("documentation_id") REFERENCES documentation ("documentation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_output_components_version FOREIGN KEY ("version") REFERENCES shader_versions ("version_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "texture_units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each texture unit */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the texture unit */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the texture unit */,
  "max_value" INTEGER /* No. of texture image units accessible by a vertex shader */,
  "version" TEXT /* OpenGL version where the texture unit is supported */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the texture unit */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value of the texture unit */,
  "usage_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the unit is used in different shader programs */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date and time when the unit was last modified */,
  "documentation_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the documentation table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_texture_units_documentation_id FOREIGN KEY ("documentation_id") REFERENCES documentation ("documentation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_texture_units_version FOREIGN KEY ("version") REFERENCES shader_versions ("version_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "shader_programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shader program */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the shader program */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the shader program */,
  "version" TEXT /* OpenGL version where the program is supported */,
  "source_code" TEXT /* Source code of the shader program */,
  "compile_status" TEXT /* Status of the last compilation */,
  "last_compiled" TEXT /* Date and time when the program was last compiled */,
  "documentation_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the documentation table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shader_programs_version FOREIGN KEY ("version") REFERENCES shader_versions ("version_number"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shader_programs_documentation_id FOREIGN KEY ("documentation_id") REFERENCES documentation ("documentation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shader_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each OpenGL version */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of OpenGL */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the OpenGL version */,
  "features" TEXT /* Features introduced in the OpenGL version */,
  "documentation_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the documentation table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shader_versions_documentation_id FOREIGN KEY ("documentation_id") REFERENCES documentation ("documentation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "developers" (
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each developer */,
  "developer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the developer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the developer */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the developer (e.g., shader programmer, project lead) */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Date and time of the developer's last activity */,
  "documentation_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the documentation table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("developer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_developers_documentation_id FOREIGN KEY ("documentation_id") REFERENCES documentation ("documentation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "program_developers" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shader program */,
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the developer working on the shader program */,
  "role_in_program" TEXT /* Role of the developer in the specific shader program */,
  "last_contributed" TEXT /* Date and time of the developer's last contribution to the program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id", "developer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "documentation" (
  "documentation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each documentation entry */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the documentation */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the documentation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the documentation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the documentation was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("documentation_id")
)
